# kCMTextJustification_left_top

**Global Variable**

A type that describes left justification when specified for horizontal justification, top justification for vertical justification.

## Declaration

```swift
var kCMTextJustification_left_top: CMTextJustificationValue { get }
```

## Constants

- **kCMTextJustification_centered**: A type that describes center justification (both horizontal and vertical justification).
- **kCMTextJustification_bottom_right**: A type that describes bottom justification when specified for vertical justification, right justification for horizontal justification.

items.description: A type that describes center justification (both horizontal and vertical justification).
items.name: kCMTextJustification_centered

items.description: A type that describes bottom justification when specified for vertical justification, right justification for horizontal justification.
